member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Abstractions.IService
member.summary: Marker interface for all service abstractions in the system.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Abstractions.IInitializable
member.summary: Base interface for services that require initialization.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Abstractions.IInitializable.InitializeAsync
member.summary: Initializes the service.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Abstractions.ILifecycleService
member.summary: Base interface for services that manage their lifecycle.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Abstractions.ILifecycleService.IsInitialized
member.summary: Indicates whether the service is initialized and ready.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1
member.summary: Represents a generic cache entry with expiration and dependency tracking.
member.typeparam: The type of value stored in the cache entry.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.Key
member.summary: Gets the unique key for this cache entry.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.Value
member.summary: Gets the cached value.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets the timestamp when this entry was created.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.ExpiresAt
member.summary: Gets the timestamp when this entry expires.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.Dependencies
member.summary: Gets the list of cache keys that this entry depends on. When any of these dependencies are invalidated, this entry becomes invalid.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.AccessCount
member.summary: Gets the number of times this entry has been accessed.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.LastAccessedAt
member.summary: Gets the timestamp of the last access.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.#ctor(System.String,`0,System.DateTime,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The unique cache key.
The value to cache.
The expiration time.
Optional list of cache keys this entry depends on.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.IsValid
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this cache entry is still valid. An entry is valid if it hasn't expired.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.IsExpired
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this cache entry has expired.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.TimeToExpiration
member.summary: Gets the time remaining until this entry expires.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.RecordAccess
member.summary: Records an access to this cache entry.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.GetDependencyKeys
member.summary: Gets the dependency keys for this entry.
member.returns: A list of cache keys that this entry depends on.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.DependsOn(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if this entry depends on a specific cache key.
member.param: The cache key to check.
member.returns: True if this entry depends on the specified key; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.Age
member.summary: Gets the age of this cache entry.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheEntry`1.ToString
member.summary: Gets a string representation of this cache entry.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.DependencyTracker
member.summary: Tracks dependencies between cache entries and provides intelligent invalidation. Uses smart logic to determine whether full or partial cache invalidation is needed.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.DependencyTracker.InvalidationCount
member.summary: Gets the total number of invalidation operations performed.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.DependencyTracker.PartialInvalidationCount
member.summary: Gets the number of partial invalidation operations performed.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.DependencyTracker.FullInvalidationCount
member.summary: Gets the number of full invalidation operations performed.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.DependencyTracker.TotalKeysAffected
member.summary: Gets the total number of keys affected by invalidation operations.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.DependencyTracker.TrackingCount
member.summary: Gets the current number of tracked keys.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.DependencyTracker.RegisterDependency(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a dependency relationship: keyA depends on keyB.
member.param: The cache key being registered.
The cache key that this key depends on.
member.exception: Thrown when key or dependsOn is null or empty.
Thrown when circular dependency is detected.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.DependencyTracker.GetDependents(System.String)
member.summary: Gets all cache keys that depend on the specified key.
member.param: The cache key to check.
member.returns: A set of cache keys that depend on the specified key.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.DependencyTracker.GetDependencies(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the dependencies for a specific cache key.
member.param: The cache key to check.
member.returns: A set of cache keys that this key depends on.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.DependencyTracker.InvalidateKey(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Invalidates a cache key and returns the set of all keys that should be invalidated. Uses smart logic: returns full invalidation signal if too many keys are affected, otherwise returns partial invalidation with specific keys.
member.param: The cache key to invalidate.
The total number of keys in the cache.
member.returns: An object containing invalidation information.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.DependencyTracker.UnregisterDependency(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Unregisters a specific dependency.
member.param: The cache key.
The dependency to remove.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.DependencyTracker.RemoveKey(System.String)
member.summary: Removes all dependencies for a specific key.
member.param: The cache key to clean up.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.DependencyTracker.Clear
member.summary: Clears all tracked dependencies.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.DependencyTracker.WouldCreateCircularDependency(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if registering a dependency would create a circular reference.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.DependencyTracker.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the dependency tracker and releases managed resources.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.InvalidationResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a cache invalidation operation.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.InvalidationResult.KeysToInvalidate
member.summary: Gets the set of cache keys that should be invalidated.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.InvalidationResult.ShouldClearAll
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether a full cache clear is recommended.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.InvalidationResult.InvalidationRatio
member.summary: Gets the ratio of affected keys to total cache size.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.InvalidationResult.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlySet{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache
member.summary: A thread-safe in-memory cache implementation with intelligent dependency-based invalidation. Tracks cache hit rates and uses partial invalidation to improve performance.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache.Hits
member.summary: Gets the number of cache hits.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache.Misses
member.summary: Gets the number of cache misses.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache.HitRate
member.summary: Gets the cache hit rate as a percentage (0-100).

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache.InvalidationCount
member.summary: Gets the number of invalidation operations.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache.InvalidatedKeysCount
member.summary: Gets the total number of keys invalidated.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache.CacheSize
member.summary: Gets the current cache size.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache.DependencyTracker
member.summary: Gets the dependency tracker used by this cache.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache.TryGetValue``1(System.String,``0@)
member.summary: Gets a value from the cache if it exists and is valid.
member.typeparam: The type of value to retrieve.
member.param: The cache key.
The cached value, if found.
member.returns: True if the value was found and is valid; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache.Set``1(System.String,``0,System.DateTime,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Sets a value in the cache with the specified expiration and dependencies.
member.typeparam: The type of value to cache.
member.param: The cache key.
The value to cache.
When the cache entry should expire.
Optional cache keys this entry depends on.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache.Set``1(System.String,``0,System.TimeSpan,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Sets a value in the cache with a duration-based expiration.
member.typeparam: The type of value to cache.
member.param: The cache key.
The value to cache.
How long the entry should be valid.
Optional cache keys this entry depends on.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache.InvalidateKey(System.String)
member.summary: Invalidates a cache key using intelligent dependency tracking. May perform either full or partial invalidation based on impact.
member.param: The cache key to invalidate.
member.returns: The number of keys that were invalidated.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache.Clear
member.summary: Clears the entire cache.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache.GetEntry``1(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a cache entry without recording a hit/miss.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache.GetMetrics
member.summary: Gets the metrics for this cache.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.IntelligentCache.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the cache and releases managed resources.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheMetrics
member.summary: Represents cache metrics and statistics.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheMetrics.Hits
member.summary: Gets the number of cache hits.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheMetrics.Misses
member.summary: Gets the number of cache misses.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheMetrics.HitRate
member.summary: Gets the cache hit rate as a percentage.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheMetrics.CacheSize
member.summary: Gets the current cache size.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheMetrics.InvalidationOperations
member.summary: Gets the number of invalidation operations.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheMetrics.TotalKeysInvalidated
member.summary: Gets the total number of keys invalidated.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheMetrics.PartialInvalidations
member.summary: Gets the number of partial invalidations.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheMetrics.FullInvalidations
member.summary: Gets the number of full invalidations.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheMetrics.TrackedDependencies
member.summary: Gets the number of tracked dependencies.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Caching.CacheMetrics.ToString
member.summary: Gets a string representation of the metrics.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.ContentionMetrics
member.summary: Metrics for lock-free collection contention. Tracks contention events, wait times, and operation counts.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.ContentionMetrics.TotalOperations
member.summary: Total number of operations performed.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.ContentionMetrics.ContentionEvents
member.summary: Number of contention events detected (for compatibility checking). In lock-free implementations, this will be 0.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.ContentionMetrics.TotalWaitTimeMs
member.summary: Estimated total wait time in milliseconds.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.ContentionMetrics.AverageWaitTimeMs
member.summary: Average wait time per operation in milliseconds.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.ContentionMetrics.LastReset
member.summary: Timestamp when metrics were last reset.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.ContentionMetrics.SuccessfulOperations
member.summary: Number of successful lock-free operations (no contention).

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.ContentionMetrics.Reset
member.summary: Resets all metrics to zero.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeEventQueue.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the LockFreeEventQueue class.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeEventQueue.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of events in the queue.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeEventQueue.Metrics
member.summary: Gets the contention metrics for this queue.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeEventQueue.Enqueue(System.Object)
member.summary: Enqueues an event to the queue. Thread-safe, lock-free operation.
member.param: The event to enqueue

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeEventQueue.TryDequeue(System.Object@)
member.summary: Tries to dequeue an event from the queue. Thread-safe, lock-free operation.
member.param: The dequeued event, or null if queue is empty
member.returns: True if an event was dequeued; false if queue is empty

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeEventQueue.GetAllEvents
member.summary: Gets all events currently in the queue (snapshot).
member.returns: A list of events in the queue

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeEventQueue.Clear
member.summary: Clears all events from the queue.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeRegistry.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the LockFreeRegistry class.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeRegistry.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of registered services.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeRegistry.Metrics
member.summary: Gets the contention metrics for this registry.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeRegistry.Register(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Registers a service in the registry. Thread-safe, lock-free operation.
member.param: The service key
The service instance
member.exception: If key or service is null

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeRegistry.TryGetService(System.String,System.Object@)
member.summary: Tries to get a registered service. Thread-safe, lock-free operation.
member.param: The service key
The service instance, or null if not found
member.returns: True if the service was found; false otherwise

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeRegistry.Unregister(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a service from the registry. Thread-safe, lock-free operation.
member.param: The service key
member.returns: True if the service was removed; false if it didn't exist

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeRegistry.GetAllKeys
member.summary: Gets all registered service keys.
member.returns: A list of service keys

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeRegistry.IsRegistered(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a service is registered.
member.param: The service key
member.returns: True if the service is registered; false otherwise

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Clears all services from the registry.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeCachePool.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the LockFreeCachePool class.
member.param: Maximum number of items to keep in the pool

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeCachePool.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of items in the pool.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeCachePool.Metrics
member.summary: Gets the contention metrics for this pool.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeCachePool.Return(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns an item to the pool. Thread-safe, lock-free operation.
member.param: The item to return to the pool

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeCachePool.TryRent(System.Object@)
member.summary: Tries to rent an item from the pool. Thread-safe, lock-free operation.
member.param: The rented item, or null if pool is empty
member.returns: True if an item was rented; false if pool is empty

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeCachePool.GetStatus
member.summary: Gets the current state of the pool.
member.returns: Pool statistics

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeCachePool.Clear
member.summary: Clears all items from the pool.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeDataCollection`1.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the LockFreeDataCollection class.
member.param: Maximum capacity; older items are automatically removed

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeDataCollection`1.Count
member.summary: Gets the current number of items in the collection.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeDataCollection`1.Metrics
member.summary: Gets the contention metrics for this collection.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeDataCollection`1.Add(`0)
member.summary: Adds an item to the collection. Thread-safe, lock-free operation.
member.param: The item to add

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeDataCollection`1.GetAllItems
member.summary: Gets all items in the collection (snapshot).
member.returns: A list of items

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeDataCollection`1.GetItemsAfter(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Gets all items added after a specific date.
member.param: The cutoff date
member.returns: A list of items added after the specified date

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeDataCollection`1.RemoveItemsBefore(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Removes items older than a specified date. Note: This operation is not atomic; use for cleanup only.
member.param: Items added before this date will be removed
member.returns: The number of items removed

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeDataCollection`1.Clear
member.summary: Clears all items from the collection.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeDataCollection`1.CleanupOldItems
member.summary: Cleans up old items to maintain max capacity. This is called automatically when capacity is exceeded.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeOptimizationSummary
member.summary: Summary of lock-free collection benefits and migration path.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.LockFreeOptimizationSummary.GetMigrationSummary
member.summary: Gets a summary of performance improvements when migrating from lock-based to lock-free collections.
member.returns: Migration summary with expected benefits

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.TaskBatcher`1
member.summary: Generic task batcher that accumulates items and processes them in batches. Uses timeout-based flushing and parallel dispatch for high-throughput scenarios. Thread-safe implementation using ReaderWriterLockSlim for synchronization.
member.typeparam: The type of items to batch process.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.TaskBatcher`1.BatchSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of items to accumulate before automatic flush.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.TaskBatcher`1.FlushInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets the flush interval in milliseconds for timeout-based flushing.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.TaskBatcher`1.QueuedItemCount
member.summary: Gets the current number of items queued for batch processing.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.TaskBatcher`1.#ctor(System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.List{`0}},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the TaskBatcher class.
member.param: The callback action to invoke with accumulated items.
The maximum number of items before automatic flush. Default is 100.
The timeout interval in milliseconds for automatic flush. Default is 50.
member.exception: Thrown when batchSize or flushInterval is invalid.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.TaskBatcher`1.Enqueue(`0)
member.summary: Enqueues an item for batch processing. Automatically flushes if batch size is reached.
member.param: The item to enqueue.
member.exception: Thrown when the batcher has been disposed.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.TaskBatcher`1.Flush
member.summary: Manually flushes all accumulated items in the queue.
member.exception: Thrown when the batcher has been disposed.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.TaskBatcher`1.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the task batcher and releases all resources. Automatically flushes any remaining items before disposal.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.TaskBatcher`1.FlushInternal
member.summary: Internal method to perform the actual flush operation. Must be called with the write lock acquired.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Concurrency.TaskBatcher`1.FlushTimerCallback(System.Object)
member.summary: Timer callback for automatic timeout-based flushing.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Configuration.ConfigurationExtensions
member.summary: Configures application settings from appsettings.json files.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Configuration.ConfigurationExtensions.BuildConfiguration(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an IConfiguration instance from appsettings.json.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Configuration.ConfigurationExtensions.GetSection``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Binds configuration section to a strongly-typed object.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.DependencyInjection.CoreServiceExtensions
member.summary: Registers core infrastructure services into the dependency injection container.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.DependencyInjection.CoreServiceExtensions.AddCoreInfrastructure(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Registers all core infrastructure services.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.EventPublisherCoalescingExample
member.summary: Example integration demonstrating how to use MessageCoalescer with an EventPublisher pattern. This coalesces similar events by type and source, reducing the number of event publications.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.EventPublisherCoalescingExample.Event
member.summary: Represents an event with type and source information.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.EventPublisherCoalescingExample.EventKey
member.summary: Key for grouping events by type and source.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.EventPublisherCoalescingExample.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new EventPublisher with event coalescing. Similar events (same type and source) are batched and published together.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.EventPublisherCoalescingExample.PublishEvent(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Publishes an event. The event is accumulated with similar events and dispatched when the batch is ready.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.EventPublisherCoalescingExample.OnEventBatchReady(MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.EventPublisherCoalescingExample.EventKey,System.Collections.Generic.List{MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.EventPublisherCoalescingExample.Event})
member.summary: Callback invoked when a batch of events is ready for publication.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.EventPublisherCoalescingExample.Flush
member.summary: Flushes any pending events immediately.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.EventPublisherCoalescingExample.GetMetrics
member.summary: Gets coalescing metrics.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.EventPublisherCoalescingExample.Dispose
member.summary: Cleans up resources.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.NotificationQueueCoalescingExample
member.summary: Example integration demonstrating how to use MessageCoalescer with a notification queue. This coalesces notifications by category, reducing the number of notification dispatches.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.NotificationQueueCoalescingExample.Notification
member.summary: Represents a notification with category, priority, and content.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.NotificationQueueCoalescingExample.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new NotificationQueue with notification coalescing. Notifications are grouped by category and dispatched in batches.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.NotificationQueueCoalescingExample.Enqueue(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Enqueues a notification. Notifications are accumulated by category.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.NotificationQueueCoalescingExample.OnNotificationBatchReady(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.NotificationQueueCoalescingExample.Notification})
member.summary: Callback invoked when a batch of notifications is ready for dispatch.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.NotificationQueueCoalescingExample.Flush
member.summary: Flushes any pending notifications immediately.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.NotificationQueueCoalescingExample.GetMetrics
member.summary: Gets coalescing metrics.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.NotificationQueueCoalescingExample.DispatchCount
member.summary: Gets the number of dispatch operations performed.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integrations.NotificationQueueCoalescingExample.Dispose
member.summary: Cleans up resources.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.EventHandlerExample
member.summary: Example integration of TaskBatcher with event handler pattern. Demonstrates how to batch events before invoking handlers.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.EventHandlerExample.DomainEvent
member.summary: Represents a domain event.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.EventHandlerExample.UserCreatedEvent
member.summary: Example domain event.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.EventHandlerExample.BatchedEventHandler
member.summary: Event handler using TaskBatcher for batched event processing. Useful for high-volume event scenarios where batch processing is more efficient.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.EventHandlerExample.BatchedEventHandler.#ctor(System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.List{MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.EventHandlerExample.DomainEvent}},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new event handler with batched event processing.
member.param: Callback to process batches of events.
Number of events to accumulate before processing. Default: 100.
Timeout in milliseconds for batch dispatch. Default: 50ms.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.EventHandlerExample.BatchedEventHandler.Handle(MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.EventHandlerExample.DomainEvent)
member.summary: Handles a domain event by enqueuing it for batch processing.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.EventHandlerExample.BatchedEventHandler.ProcessEventBatch(System.Collections.Generic.List{MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.EventHandlerExample.DomainEvent})
member.summary: Internally processes a batch of events.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.EventHandlerExample.BatchedEventHandler.QueuedEventCount
member.summary: Gets the number of queued events awaiting processing.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.EventHandlerExample.BatchedEventHandler.Flush
member.summary: Flushes all queued events immediately.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.EventHandlerExample.ExampleUsage
member.summary: Example usage of BatchedEventHandler.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.MessageDispatcherExample
member.summary: Example integration of TaskBatcher with message dispatcher pattern. Demonstrates how to batch messages before dispatching to handlers.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.MessageDispatcherExample.Message
member.summary: Represents a message to be dispatched.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.MessageDispatcherExample.BatchedMessageDispatcher
member.summary: Message dispatcher using TaskBatcher for batched message handling.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.MessageDispatcherExample.BatchedMessageDispatcher.#ctor(System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.List{MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.MessageDispatcherExample.Message}},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new message dispatcher with batched message handling.
member.param: Callback to handle batches of messages.
Number of messages to accumulate before dispatch. Default: 100.
Timeout in milliseconds for dispatch. Default: 50ms.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.MessageDispatcherExample.BatchedMessageDispatcher.Dispatch(MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.MessageDispatcherExample.Message)
member.summary: Dispatches a message for processing. The message will be batched and processed with others.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.MessageDispatcherExample.BatchedMessageDispatcher.HandleMessageBatch(System.Collections.Generic.List{MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.MessageDispatcherExample.Message})
member.summary: Internally handles a batch of messages.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.MessageDispatcherExample.BatchedMessageDispatcher.QueuedMessageCount
member.summary: Gets the number of queued messages awaiting dispatch.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.MessageDispatcherExample.BatchedMessageDispatcher.Flush
member.summary: Immediately flushes all queued messages.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.MessageDispatcherExample.ExampleUsage
member.summary: Example usage of BatchedMessageDispatcher.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.TaskSchedulerExample
member.summary: Example integration of TaskBatcher with task scheduler pattern. Demonstrates how to batch work items for efficient scheduled execution.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.TaskSchedulerExample.WorkItem
member.summary: Represents a scheduled work item.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.TaskSchedulerExample.BatchedTaskScheduler
member.summary: Task scheduler using TaskBatcher for batched task execution. Efficiently executes work items in batches with optional prioritization.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.TaskSchedulerExample.BatchedTaskScheduler.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new task scheduler with batched work item processing.
member.param: Number of work items to accumulate before dispatch. Default: 100.
Timeout in milliseconds for batch dispatch. Default: 50ms.
Maximum concurrent tasks to execute. Default: 10.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.TaskSchedulerExample.BatchedTaskScheduler.Schedule(MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.TaskSchedulerExample.WorkItem)
member.summary: Schedules a work item for batched execution.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.TaskSchedulerExample.BatchedTaskScheduler.Schedule(System.String,System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Schedules a work item with a delegate action.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.TaskSchedulerExample.BatchedTaskScheduler.ExecuteWorkItemBatch(System.Collections.Generic.List{MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.TaskSchedulerExample.WorkItem})
member.summary: Internally executes a batch of work items with concurrency control.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.TaskSchedulerExample.BatchedTaskScheduler.ExecuteWorkItemWithConcurrencyControl(MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.TaskSchedulerExample.WorkItem)
member.summary: Executes a single work item with concurrency limiting.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.TaskSchedulerExample.BatchedTaskScheduler.QueuedWorkItemCount
member.summary: Gets the number of queued work items.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.TaskSchedulerExample.BatchedTaskScheduler.Flush
member.summary: Flushes all queued work items and executes them immediately.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Integration.Examples.TaskSchedulerExample.ExampleUsage
member.summary: Example usage of BatchedTaskScheduler.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Logging.LoggingConfiguration
member.summary: Configures and manages Serilog logging for the application.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Logging.LoggingConfiguration.CreateLogger(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a configured logger instance with console and file sinks.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Logging.LoggingConfiguration.AddSerilog(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggingBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Extends Microsoft.Extensions.Logging with Serilog.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2
member.summary: Generic message coalescer that accumulates messages by key and dispatches them in batches. Reduces message throughput by combining similar messages and dispatching them together.
member.typeparam: The type of message being coalesced
The key type for grouping messages

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.FlushInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets the interval (in milliseconds) after which batches are automatically flushed. Default: 100ms

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.BatchSizeThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of messages to accumulate before forcing a flush. Default: 50 messages

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.CoalescedCount
member.summary: Gets the number of distinct keys with coalesced messages waiting to be dispatched.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.TotalMessagesEnqueued
member.summary: Gets the total number of messages that have been enqueued.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.TotalBatchesDispatched
member.summary: Gets the total number of batches that have been dispatched.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.TotalMessagesReduced
member.summary: Gets the total number of messages that were reduced through coalescing.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.#ctor(System.Action{`1,System.Collections.Generic.List{`0}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MessageCoalescer class.
member.param: Callback invoked when a batch of messages is ready for dispatch. The callback receives the key and the list of coalesced messages for that key.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.Enqueue(`1,`0)
member.summary: Enqueues a message with the specified key. Messages with the same key are accumulated and dispatched together when either the batch size threshold is reached or the flush interval expires.
member.param: The key to group the message by
The message to enqueue
member.exception: Thrown when the coalescer is disposed

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.Flush
member.summary: Manually flushes all accumulated batches, invoking the batch ready callback for each.
member.exception: Thrown when the coalescer is disposed

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.GetMetrics
member.summary: Gets comprehensive metrics about the coalescing efficiency.
member.returns: A dictionary containing metrics such as total messages, reduction count/percentage, batches dispatched, and reduction percentage.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.ResetMetrics
member.summary: Resets all metrics to zero.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Messaging.MessageCoalescer`2.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by the MessageCoalescer.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObject
member.summary: Represents an event object that can be pooled and reused.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObject.EventType
member.summary: Gets or sets the event type.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObject.Timestamp
member.summary: Gets or sets the event timestamp.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObject.Data
member.summary: Gets or sets the event data.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObject.Source
member.summary: Gets or sets the event source.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObject.Reset
member.summary: Resets the event object to its initial state.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObjectPool
member.summary: Specialized object pool for event objects.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObjectPool.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the EventObjectPool.
member.param: Maximum number of event objects to pool.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObjectPool.Rent
member.summary: Rents an event object from the pool.
member.returns: An EventObject instance.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObjectPool.Return(MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObject)
member.summary: Returns an event object to the pool.
member.param: The event object to return.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObjectPool.GetMetrics
member.summary: Gets the current metrics for the event object pool.
member.returns: Pool metrics.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObjectPool.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the event object pool.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObjectPoolMetrics
member.summary: Metrics for EventObjectPool.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObjectPoolMetrics.PoolHits
member.summary: Gets or sets pool hits.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObjectPoolMetrics.PoolMisses
member.summary: Gets or sets pool misses.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObjectPoolMetrics.TotalAllocations
member.summary: Gets or sets total allocations.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObjectPoolMetrics.AvailableCount
member.summary: Gets or sets available count in pool.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObjectPoolMetrics.HitRate
member.summary: Gets or sets pool hit rate percentage.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.EventObjectPoolMetrics.AllocationReductionPercentage
member.summary: Gets or sets the allocation reduction percentage.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.MessageBufferPool
member.summary: Specialized object pool for message buffer objects (512 byte buffers).

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.MessageBufferPool.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MessageBufferPool.
member.param: Maximum number of buffers to pool.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.MessageBufferPool.Rent
member.summary: Rents a message buffer from the pool.
member.returns: A 512-byte buffer.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.MessageBufferPool.Return(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Returns a message buffer to the pool.
member.param: The buffer to return.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.MessageBufferPool.GetMetrics
member.summary: Gets the current metrics for the message buffer pool.
member.returns: Pool metrics.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.MessageBufferPool.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the message buffer pool.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.MessageBufferPoolMetrics
member.summary: Metrics for MessageBufferPool.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.MessageBufferPoolMetrics.PoolHits
member.summary: Gets or sets pool hits.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.MessageBufferPoolMetrics.PoolMisses
member.summary: Gets or sets pool misses.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.MessageBufferPoolMetrics.TotalAllocations
member.summary: Gets or sets total allocations.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.MessageBufferPoolMetrics.AvailableCount
member.summary: Gets or sets available count in pool.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.MessageBufferPoolMetrics.HitRate
member.summary: Gets or sets pool hit rate percentage.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.MessageBufferPoolMetrics.BufferSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the buffer size in bytes.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.MessageBufferPoolMetrics.AllocationReductionPercentage
member.summary: Gets or sets the allocation reduction percentage.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.ObjectPool`1
member.summary: A thread-safe, generic object pool for reusing objects and reducing GC pressure.
member.typeparam: The type of object to pool.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.ObjectPool`1.#ctor(System.Func{`0},System.Action{`0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ObjectPool class.
member.param: Factory function to create new objects when pool is empty.
Optional action to reset object state when returned to pool.
Maximum number of objects to pool (default 500).

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.ObjectPool`1.PoolSize
member.summary: Gets the current size of the pool.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.ObjectPool`1.AvailableCount
member.summary: Gets the number of objects currently available in the pool.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.ObjectPool`1.Rent
member.summary: Rents an object from the pool. If the pool is empty, creates a new object.
member.returns: An object of type T.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.ObjectPool`1.Return(`0)
member.summary: Returns an object to the pool.
member.param: The object to return.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.ObjectPool`1.GetMetrics
member.summary: Gets the current pool metrics.
member.returns: A PoolMetrics object with allocation statistics.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.ObjectPool`1.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the pool and clears all objects.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.PoolMetrics
member.summary: Metrics for an ObjectPool instance.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.PoolMetrics.PoolHits
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of times an object was successfully retrieved from the pool.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.PoolMetrics.PoolMisses
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of times a new object was created because the pool was empty.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.PoolMetrics.TotalAllocations
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of Rent() calls.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.PoolMetrics.TotalReturns
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of Return() calls.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.PoolMetrics.AvailableCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of objects currently available in the pool.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.PoolMetrics.PoolSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum size of the pool.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.PoolMetrics.HitRate
member.summary: Gets or sets the hit rate percentage.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.PoolMetrics.AllocationReductionRatio
member.summary: Gets the allocation reduction ratio (hits / total allocations).

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObject
member.summary: Represents a task object that can be pooled and reused.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObject.TaskId
member.summary: Gets or sets the task ID.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObject.TaskName
member.summary: Gets or sets the task name.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObject.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets the task status.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObject.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the task creation timestamp.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObject.ExecutionTimeMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the task execution time in milliseconds.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObject.Payload
member.summary: Gets or sets the task payload.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObject.Reset
member.summary: Resets the task object to its initial state.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskStatus
member.summary: Enumeration for task status.

member.name: F:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskStatus.Pending
member.summary: Task is pending.

member.name: F:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskStatus.Running
member.summary: Task is running.

member.name: F:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskStatus.Completed
member.summary: Task completed successfully.

member.name: F:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskStatus.Failed
member.summary: Task failed.

member.name: F:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskStatus.Cancelled
member.summary: Task was cancelled.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObjectPool
member.summary: Specialized object pool for task objects.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObjectPool.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the TaskObjectPool.
member.param: Maximum number of task objects to pool.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObjectPool.Rent
member.summary: Rents a task object from the pool.
member.returns: A TaskObject instance.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObjectPool.Return(MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObject)
member.summary: Returns a task object to the pool.
member.param: The task object to return.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObjectPool.GetMetrics
member.summary: Gets the current metrics for the task object pool.
member.returns: Pool metrics.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObjectPool.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the task object pool.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObjectPoolMetrics
member.summary: Metrics for TaskObjectPool.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObjectPoolMetrics.PoolHits
member.summary: Gets or sets pool hits.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObjectPoolMetrics.PoolMisses
member.summary: Gets or sets pool misses.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObjectPoolMetrics.TotalAllocations
member.summary: Gets or sets total allocations.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObjectPoolMetrics.AvailableCount
member.summary: Gets or sets available count in pool.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObjectPoolMetrics.HitRate
member.summary: Gets or sets pool hit rate percentage.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.ObjectPooling.TaskObjectPoolMetrics.AllocationReductionPercentage
member.summary: Gets or sets the allocation reduction percentage.
